nodes.label: Async SDK adapter for the TraceChain event-ledger REST API.
Initialise the adapter with a validated configuration.
Enter the async context manager and connect the adapter.
Exit the async context manager and close the adapter.
Initialise the HTTP client and authenticate once when needed.
Close the HTTP client and clear in-memory auth cache.
Submit a single event to the TraceChain ledger.
Submit a batch of events to the TraceChain ledger.
Fetch a single stored event by identifier.
Query stored events with server-side filters.
Verify anchoring and Merkle proof for a stored event.
Fetch details for a specific batch.
Trigger a server-side retry operation for a batch.
Validate a single response object and map schema errors to adapter exceptions.
Validate list response items and map item schema errors to adapter exceptions.
Return the active ``httpx.AsyncClient``, initialising it when needed.
Authenticate using credential mode and cache the returned token in memory.
Authenticate via FusionAuth login API and cache the returned access token.
Execute an HTTP request and parse the response body as JSON.
Execute a single authenticated HTTP request with error mapping.
Raise the appropriate adapter exception for a non-success response.
Extract the access token from auth payloads in supported response shapes.
Parse the ``Retry-After`` header from an HTTP response into seconds.
Validate that a single event's serialised JSON does not exceed size limit.
Normalise a single-object API response from bare or wrapped format.
Normalise a list API response from bare or wrapped format.
